name: Bard 20x48 RV Garage Shed Plan - Large Modern Barn Style RV Storage & Workshop
open_features: A spacious footprint designed to comfortably house large RVs, motorhomes, trailers, boats, and multiple vehicles with additional room for storage or workspace.
Classic wood-style overhead doors create a rustic barn look while providing wide, easy access for large vehicles.
High Gable Roof for Vertical Clearance
The tall gable roof provides increased interior height, improved drainage, and the timeless appearance of a modern barn-style structure.
Vertical wood siding paired with a stone wainscot base detail adds durability, character, and long-lasting curb appeal.
description_summary: Upgrade your property with the Bard RV Garage Shed - a spacious 20x48 storage and workshop structure designed for durability, versatility, and timeless barn-inspired style. Featuring a tall gable roof, warm vertical wood siding, rustic carriage-style garage doors, and a sturdy stone wainscot base, Bard blends classic workshop architecture with practical modern functionality. The elongated 20x48 footprint creates a generous interior capable of housing RVs, campers, boats, trailers, trucks, or...
